payload.title: Capital Program Committee Meeting
payload.description: MTA Capital Program Committee Meeting book for January 2024, including Infrastructure Business Unit updates on Coney Island Yard flood mitigation, 207th Street Yard projects, Bus Radio System, Rockaway Line Resiliency, Jamaica Bus Depot, and project status reports.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metropolitan Transportation Authority
Capital Program Committee Meeting
January 2024

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: MTA C&D manages capital program infrastructure projects for NYCT including state of good repair, resiliency, and sustainability.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Construction & Development's (C&D) last report to the Capital Program Committee for New York City Transit (NYCT) Infrastructure projects was in April 2023.
Metropolitan Transportation Authority

payload.description: B&T operates 7 bridges and 2 tunnels, linking the 5 boroughs of New York City and serving approximately 325 million vehicles annually.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B&T operates 7 bridges and 2 tunnels, linking the 5 boroughs of New York City and serving approximately 325 million vehicles annually.

payload.description: The Infrastructure BU within C&D focuses on maintaining a state of good repair for NYCT infrastructure, as well as bolstering the resiliency and sustainability of the transit system.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Infrastructure Business Unit (BU) within C&D focuses on maintaining a state of good repair for NYCT infrastructure, as well as bolstering the resiliency and sustainability of the transit system.

tool_args.label: Coney Island Yard Flood Mitigation & Sandy Repairs

payload.project_name: Coney Island Yard Flood Mitigation & Sandy Repairs
payload.description: Flood mitigation and drainage improvements to protect Coney Island Yard from future storm events. Over 2 miles of perimeter flood protection, new pump stations, drainage/outfall systems, power cable bridges, and rehabilitation of 4 Circuit Breaker Houses.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This project provides flood mitigation and drainage improvements to protect the yard from future storm events.
The project reached substantial completion on December 29, 2023.

tool_args.label: 207th Street Yard Flood Mitigation & Signal Repairs

payload.project_name: 207th Street Yard Flood Mitigation & Signal Repairs
payload.description: Construction of a new 2,400 foot flood wall and five flood gates on the river side of the yard as well as replacing track, signals, and traction power cabling within the yard, including two new signal relay buildings supporting a modernized signal system.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 207th St Yard Flood Protection and Signal Repairs includes construction of a new 2,400 foot flood wall and five flood gates

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.description: Relocates the existing NYC DEP sewer line from beneath the yard to a new location outside of the yard footprint. Addresses the risk of backflow flooding via the sewer as occurred during Superstorm Sandy.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 207th St Yard Sewer Relocation relocates the existing NYC DEP sewer line from beneath the yard to a new location outside of the yard footprint.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.description: Modernizes the interlockings, tracks, switches, and signals on the A Line from north of the Dyckman St Station to the 207th St Yard. Declared substantially complete on schedule and on budget in August 2023, delivered 17 months faster than originally planned.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 200t-207th St Mainline Track & Signal Repairs modernizes the interlockings, tracks, switches, and signals on the A Line

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.description: Replacement of AC and DC electrical panels, replacement of outdated windows, repair of exterior wall brickwork, replacement of two steel columns and lintels, installation of two rooftop HVAC units, exhaust fan, window AC units, and heater radiators.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 207th St Maintenance Shop Component Repairs includes the replacement of the current AC and DC electrical panels, the replacement of all outdated and deteriorated windows throughout

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.description: New digital radio system providing voice and data communications for all NYCT and MTA Bus operators and field supervisors. Includes 34 base stations, outfitting approximately 6,000 buses and 250 non-revenue vehicles, new Bus Command Center with dispatch consoles.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This project is providing a new digital radio system for state-of-the-art communications between the fleet, the newly constructed Bus Command Center (BCC) and new base radio sites

payload.description: Long-term flood mitigation project for Rockaway Line including room hardening at Howard Beach, Broad Channel and Beach 116th St, debris shields, signal tower and crossover at Beach 105th St Station, replacement of electrical/mechanical equipment on South Channel Bridge, Hammels Wye Viaduct Rehabilitation, and Rockaway Line Viaduct Rehabilitation.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Rockaway Line, which crosses the Jamaica Bay estuary, experienced some of the worst damage from Superstorm Sandy.

payload.description: Design and construction of a state-of-the-art bus maintenance and storage facility to replace the existing Jamaica Depot opened in 1939. Facility includes 134,000 SF bus depot, 272 bus parking spots, 15 maintenance bays, 37,000 SF three-story administration building. Capable of charging 60 electric buses, designed for all-electric fleet by 2030.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This project is for design and construction of a state-of-the-art bus maintenance and storage facility to replace the existing Jamaica Depot. The current building was opened in 1939.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

tool_args.label: 207th Street Yard Flood Mitigation & Signal Repairs

payload.project_name: 207th Street Yard Flood Mitigation & Signal Repairs
payload.description: Construction of a new 2,400 foot flood wall and five flood gates on the river side of the yard as well as replacing track, signals, and traction power cabling within the yard, including two new signal relay buildings supporting a modernized signal system.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 207 th St Yard Flood Protection and Signal Repairs includes construction of a new 2,400 foot flood wall and five flood gates on the river side of the yard as well as replacing track, signals, and traction power cabling within the yard, including two new signal relay buildings
Yard Flood Mitigation & Signal Repairs Nov 2023 $637M May 2024 $642M 95%

payload.description: Relocates the existing NYC DEP sewer line from beneath the yard to a new location outside of the yard footprint. Addresses the risk of backflow flooding via the sewer as occurred during Superstorm Sandy.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 207 th St Yard Sewer Relocation relocates the existing NYC DEP sewer line from beneath the yard to a new location outside of the yard footprint. This addresses the risk of backflow flooding via the sewer as occurred during Superstorm Sandy.
Sewer Relocation June 2024 $163M November 2024 $163M 87%

payload.description: Modernizes the interlockings, tracks, switches, and signals on the A Line from north of the Dyckman St Station to the 207th St Yard. Declared substantially complete on schedule and on budget in August 2023, delivered 17 months faster than originally planned.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 200 t -207 th St Mainline Track & Signal Repairs modernizes the interlockings, tracks, switches, and signals on the A Line from north of the Dyckman St Station to the 207 th St Yard.
Mainline Track & Signal Repairs Aug 2023 $150M Aug 2023 (A) $150M 100%

payload.description: Replacement of AC and DC electrical panels, replacement of outdated windows, repair of exterior wall brickwork, replacement of two steel columns and lintels, installation of two rooftop HVAC units, exhaust fan, window AC units, and heater radiators.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 207 th St Maintenance Shop Component Repairs includes the replacement of the current AC and DC electrical panels, the replacement of all outdated and deteriorated windows throughout, repair of exterior wall brickwork, and the replacement of two steel columns and lintels.
Maintenance Shop Component Repairs Apr 2025 $40M Apr 2025 $40M 20%

payload.description: Long-term flood mitigation project protecting critical assets along the Rockaway Line providing A train service. Includes room hardening, debris shields, signal tower and crossover at Beach 105th St Station, replacement of electrical/mechanical equipment on South Channel Bridge, Hammels Wye Viaduct Rehabilitation, and Rockaway Line Viaduct Rehabilitation.

evidence_refs.source_quote: PROJECT STATUS Current Forecast Substantial Completion Aug 2026 Aug 2026 Budget $599 M $611 M The project is 15% complete.
The Rockaway Line, which crosses the Jamaica Bay estuary, experienced some of the worst damage from Superstorm Sandy.

payload.description: Design and construction of a state-of-the-art bus maintenance and storage facility to replace the existing Jamaica Depot opened in 1939. Facility includes 134,000 SF bus depot, 272 bus parking spots, 15 maintenance bays, 37,000 SF three-story administration building. Capable of charging 60 electric buses, designed for all-electric fleet by 2030.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This project is for design and construction of a state-of-the-art bus maintenance and storage facility to replace the existing Jamaica Depot.
PROJECT STATUS Current Forecast Substantial Completion Dec 2026 Jul 2027 Budget $654 M $654 M The project is 9% complete.
